USAGE:
    Tanka.DocsGen.dll build [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                      Prints help information                     
        --debug                     Set output to verbose messages              
    -f, --file <FILE>               tanka-docs.yml file path                    
    -o, --output <OUTPUT>           Output directory                            
    -b, --build <BUILD>             Build directory                             
        --base <BASE>               Set the base href meta for the generated    
                                    html pages                                  
        --link-validation <MODE>    Link validation mode: strict or relaxed

USAGE:
    Tanka.DocsGen.dll init [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                   Prints help information                        
    -f, --force                  Overwrite existing files without prompting     
        --ui-bundle-only         Only extract UI bundle, skip configuration file
                                 creation                                       
        --config-only            Only create configuration files, skip UI bundle
                                 extraction                                     
        --no-wip                 Skip creating tanka-docs-wip.yml (create only  
                                 main configuration)                            
        --branch <BRANCH>        Specify default branch name (default:          
                                 auto-detect from git)                          
        --output-dir <PATH>      Specify output directory (default: current     
                                 directory)                                     
    -q, --quiet                  Skip post-creation configuration guidance (for 
                                 automation)                                    
        --project-name <NAME>    Specify project name (default: derive from     
                                 directory name)

USAGE:
    Tanka.DocsGen.dll init [OPTIONS]

OPTIONS:
    -h, --help                   Prints help information                        
    -f, --force                  Overwrite existing files without prompting     
        --ui-bundle-only         Only extract UI bundle, skip configuration file
                                 creation                                       
        --config-only            Only create configuration files, skip UI bundle
                                 extraction                                     
        --no-wip                 Skip creating tanka-docs-wip.yml (create only  
                                 main configuration)                            
        --branch <BRANCH>        Specify default branch name (default:          
                                 auto-detect from git)                          
        --output-dir <PATH>      Specify output directory (default: current     
                                 directory)                                     
    -q, --quiet                  Skip post-creation configuration guidance (for 
                                 automation)                                    
        --project-name <NAME>    Specify project name (default: derive from     
                                 directory name)
